indicators.name: no flat personal work surface
indicators.rationale: The absence of a flat surface at sitting height makes it impossible to set up a computer workstation.

indicators.name: bed in the foreground
indicators.rationale: A bed in the foreground suggests a sleeping area rather than a workspace.

indicators.name: closed door providing privacy
indicators.rationale: A closed door can provide some privacy, but it does not replace a dedicated workspace.

indicators.name: low-traffic residential layout
indicators.rationale: The layout of a residential space is not conducive to focused solo work.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is marginally suitable for computer work (solo). While there is a closed door providing some privacy, the presence of a bed in the foreground and the low-traffic residential layout make it difficult to set up a dedicated workspace. The absence of a flat personal work surface is the primary reason for the low score.
